entries.name: Canonical QRE contract vocabulary
entries.notes: Owns the canonical vocabulary and documented semantics only; does not grant runtime or execution authority.

entries.name: Tiingo hypothesis/candidate research mini-loop
entries.notes: Provider-specific path may bridge into canonical contracts but cannot own provider-agnostic canonical semantics.

entries.name: Daily digest / operator summary
entries.notes: Consumes artifacts and summarizes status; it must not create research objects.

entries.name: run_research / registry / strategy_matrix legacy surface
entries.notes: Settled as a protected legacy compatibility surface. It owns no modern canonical objects, has no research-object producer authority, and frozen-output mutation remains separately forbidden.

entries.name: Alpha discovery / generated hypothesis / generated strategy lifecycle
entries.notes: Settled as governance-only bridge/read-model surface. It may connect to the canonical funnel only through explicit bridge/read-model contracts, may consume canonical contracts, and may emit bridge/readiness read models only. It has no independent canonical loop ownership, no canonical object ownership, no executable synthesis authority, and no shadow, paper, live, broker, risk, order, or capital authority.

entries.name: Empirical research flywheel / v7.1 trusted-loop artifacts
entries.notes: Settled as an operator-trusted governance read model for the v7.1 trust slice only. It preserves trust/evidence artifacts but has no independent canonical loop, deployment, paper, shadow, live, or broker authority.

entries.name: Bounded strategy synthesis readiness
entries.notes: Settled as governance-only non-executable synthesis consideration. It may report readiness, eligibility, and dispositions only; it may not execute strategy synthesis, create production strategies, presets, or campaigns, or grant shadow, paper, live, broker, risk, order, or capital authority. Any future escalation beyond reporting requires a new explicit operator-approved roadmap phase.

entries.name: QRE funnel architecture audit
entries.notes: Static architecture diagnosis only; PR 2 will extend this into closed-world enforcement.

entries.name: Test and smoke fixture paths
entries.notes: Fixtures can prove behavior but cannot own canonical funnel semantics or empirical evidence.

entries.name: Canonical QRE funnel verification
entries.notes: Static fixture-only route verification; it owns no canonical semantics and grants no research execution or synthesis authority.

entries.name: QRE rejection reason intelligence
entries.notes: Defines provider-agnostic rejection and blocking reason records for memory read models; grants no research execution or synthesis authority.

entries.name: QRE hypothesis generator governance
entries.notes: Governs hypothesis prioritization with memory, rejection, source quality, budget, architecture, and maturity signals; does not increase throughput or create research objects.

entries.name: QRE governed research throughput controls
entries.notes: Plans bounded research admission with candidate, campaign, source, behavior-family, timeframe, duplicate, failure-memory, data-quality, architecture, maturity, and operator-decision controls; does not run research or create research objects.

entries.name: QRE governed offline research dry run
entries.notes: Runs a deterministic in-memory offline fixture route through governed stage records, EvidencePack-like payload, Disposition, FeedbackRecord, and LessonMemory read models. It does not run production research, mutate frozen outputs, or grant synthesis, shadow, paper, live, broker, risk, order, or capital authority.

entries.name: QRE governed candidate batch
entries.notes: Plans a bounded deterministic offline candidate batch over throughput controls and offline dry-run results. It emits read-only plans, blocked reasons, evidence/disposition summaries, memory feedback, and next actions; it does not run uncontrolled research, mutate frozen outputs, create production artifacts, or grant execution authority.

entries.name: QRE evidence memory accumulation
entries.notes: Accumulates governed offline batch evidence and memory feedback as read models, preserving rejection reasons, missing-vs-negative evidence distinction, repeated failure modes, lineage, disposition trends, retest suppression, and next actions without production artifacts or execution authority.

entries.name: QRE operator trust multirun report
entries.notes: Read-only operator-facing report over governed offline runs and batches. It summarizes tested hypotheses, admitted/blocked counts, rejection reasons, evidence completeness, missing-vs-negative evidence, dispositions, memory feedback, repeated failures, blockers, and next actions without readiness or execution authority claims.

entries.name: QRE governed offline artifact persistence
entries.notes: Builds, validates, writes, and reads deterministic governed offline research artifact envelopes under caller-provided safe artifact directories. It may maintain latest.json only inside that safe directory and must not mutate frozen research outputs, create production artifacts, run research, or grant synthesis or execution authority.

entries.name: QRE governed offline research runner
entries.notes: Operator-invoked offline workflow that orchestrates single-dataset replay, multi-window evidence closure, governed artifact persistence, research memory feedback, and operator trust review. It writes only to caller-provided safe artifact directories, may maintain latest.json only inside that directory, and does not mutate frozen outputs, fetch external data, run production research, or grant synthesis, shadow, paper, live, broker, risk, order, or capital authority.

entries.name: QRE single dataset governed offline replay
entries.notes: Admits or blocks exactly one offline fixture/sample/cache dataset boundary, records source/data provenance and dataset fingerprint, runs or blocks one governed offline hypothesis through the dry-run route, and persists the outcome via the governed offline artifact contract without broadening datasets, mutating frozen outputs, or granting execution authority.

entries.name: QRE governed multi-window evidence closure
entries.notes: Records bounded offline evidence-window status for in-sample, out-of-sample, null model, cost model, trade count, and data quality windows; preserves missing-vs-negative evidence distinctions; updates governed offline artifact envelopes under caller-provided safe paths; and grants no execution authority.

entries.name: QRE governed research memory feedback loop
entries.notes: Consumes governed offline artifacts, multi-window closure outcomes, and canonical rejection reasons to produce auditable prioritization, suppression, and next-action records without creating production strategies, campaigns, or execution authority.

entries.name: QRE operator trust review gate
entries.notes: Produces operator-readable and machine-readable review decisions over governed offline evidence closure and memory feedback, including further-offline-research eligibility or explicit blockers, while denying shadow, paper, live, broker, risk, order, capital, and synthesis authority.

entries.name: QRE offline dataset admission catalog
entries.notes: Static offline-only dataset admission catalog for governed fixture/sample/cache datasets. It validates schema, source identity, dataset fingerprints, quality status, and admission status, and feeds admitted or blocked decisions into the governed offline runner without external fetching or execution authority.
